D4 Colorimetry L5 Evaluate Reference

ACES Working Spaces

see how AP1 and AP0 push their primaries to — and beyond — the spectral locus so the renderer never runs out of colour

Film and CG pipelines render in ACES. AP1 (ACEScg) is the working space — slightly wider than BT.2020, with a green primary that sits just outside the spectral locus. AP0 is the archival space, with imaginary primaries so large the triangle swallows the entire horseshoe of visible colour.

Toggle between AP1 and AP0 over the spectral locus, with sRGB and BT.2020 drawn for scale. Notice the ACES primaries reaching outside the curve — imaginary primaries that guarantee every real colour is representable with positive coordinates.
